mapper.select:
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(o.pay_amount), 0) FROM oms_order o
o.deleted = 0 AND o.order_status IN (1,4)
AND o.create_time >= CONCAT(#{param.startTime}, ' 00:00:00')
AND o.create_time <= CONCAT(#{param.endTime}, ' 23:59:59')

SELECT o.order_status AS orderStatus, COUNT(1) AS count FROM oms_order o
o.deleted = 0
AND o.create_time >= CONCAT(#{param.startTime}, ' 00:00:00')
AND o.create_time <= CONCAT(#{param.endTime}, ' 23:59:59')
GROUP BY o.order_status

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ums_member m
1 = 1
AND m.create_time >= CONCAT(#{param.startTime}, ' 00:00:00')
AND m.create_time <= CONCAT(#{param.endTime}, ' 23:59:59')

SELECT oi.product_id AS productId, oi.product_title AS productTitle, oi.product_image AS productImage, SUM(oi.quantity) AS totalSales FROM oms_order_item oi JOIN oms_order o ON oi.order_id = o.id
o.deleted = 0 AND o.order_status IN (1,4)
AND o.create_time >= CONCAT(#{param.startTime}, ' 00:00:00')
AND o.create_time <= CONCAT(#{param.endTime}, ' 23:59:59')
GROUP BY oi.product_id, oi.product_title, oi.product_image ORDER BY totalSales DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(o.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, IFNULL(SUM(o.pay_amount), 0) AS amount FROM oms_order o
o.deleted = 0 AND o.order_status IN (1,4)
AND o.create_time >= CONCAT(#{param.startTime}, ' 00:00:00')
AND o.create_time <= CONCAT(#{param.endTime}, ' 23:59:59')
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(o.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT o.order_no AS orderNo, o.order_status AS orderStatus, IFNULL(o.total_amount, 0) AS totalAmount, IFNULL(o.pay_amount, 0) AS payAmount, o.create_time AS createTime FROM oms_order o WHERE o.deleted = 0 ORDER BY o.create_time DESC LIMIT 10
